prompt:
STYLE: a photorealistic LIFESTYLE PRODUCT SCENE with clean type and graphic-callout OVERLAYS on top. 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Editorial wellness-brand marketing aesthetic — Athletic Greens / Hims / Goop social-post style.

BACKGROUND SCENE (real photo, not a flat illustration): a sun-drenched white marble kitchen counter at mid-morning, warm directional natural sunlight pouring from the right side of the frame. On the counter, centered slightly to the left: the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed). A small ceramic dish next to the jar holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES; another 3-4 scattered casually on the marble surface. A glass of lemon-water and a small linen napkin sit softly out-of-focus in the background. Bright, airy, real-photo cinematic feel with soft shadow under the jar and a warm rim-light catching the jar's curve.

OVERLAYS — clean type and graphic elements composed ON TOP of the lifestyle photo, with the photo visible behind them:
  • TOP THIRD — large bold ALL-CAPS headline overlay in deep ink-black with a subtle white text-shadow for legibility: '92 ESSENTIAL MINERALS' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Below it a smaller sub-headline in clean white text on a slim teal underline: 'From wild-harvested sea moss.'
  • Around the jar — 6 small mineral-chip pills floating as overlays in a loose constellation (not overlapping the jar's label): each pill is a small white-fill rounded rectangle with a thin teal outline, containing a bold ALL-CAPS mineral abbreviation (Fe · Mg · Ca · K · Zn · I) in teal/cyan with a tiny gray sub-label below (IRON / MAGNESIUM / CALCIUM / POTASSIUM / ZINC / IODINE). Thin gold dotted connector lines link a few of the pills toward the jar.
  • BOTTOM — a clean horizontal strip with three small feature tags: 'PLANT-BASED' · 'VEGAN' · 'NON-GMO' (small white-fill pills with teal outline and tiny teal icons).

DESIGN SYSTEM (for the overlays): muted TEAL/CYAN + warm GOLD/YELLOW + deep INK-BLACK type · bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines, clean modern sans-serif for body · NO script fonts · tiny flat outlined teal icons · all overlay elements feel like premium graphic design composed on top of a real photograph (NOT painted into the scene).

ABSOLUTE RULES: all text cleanly spelled (no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts) · 1:1 square 4K · realistic lifestyle photo background, NOT flat white · NO border/frame · reference image for jar appearance.
